seo.title: Contact
seo.description: Contact SmartMall via Zalo, Facebook, or email. Fast support and dedicated advice during business hours and beyond.

highlightsSection.title: Why customers choose to contact us directly
highlightsSection.description: Core support commitments that make consultation, order handling, and information responses faster and clearer.

sellers.note: Prefer contacting us through Zalo or Facebook for a faster response.

order.question: How can I place an order?
order.answer: You can contact us through Facebook, Zalo, or email. We will provide consultation and detailed guidance.

payment.question: How do I pay?
payment.answer: We support bank transfer and several popular e-wallets.

delivery.question: How long does delivery take?
delivery.answer: Usually within the same day, up to 24 hours. For software accounts, processing is often faster.

warranty.question: Is there a warranty?
warranty.answer: Warranty availability depends on each product. If available, the warranty period and conditions will be clearly stated in the product description.

contactMethodsSection.title: Contact SmartMall
contactMethodsSection.description: Choose the right channel for product consultation, order support, or questions before buying.

ctaSection.title: Haven’t found the information you need?
ctaSection.description: Message me if you are not sure what to choose. I will try to give quick advice so you can find the right product.

faqHelpCard.title: Still haven’t found the answer?
faqHelpCard.description: Send us your information through Zalo or email, and our support team will reply as soon as possible.
faqHelpCard.tip: Tip: Describe your needs clearly and include your order code, if available, for faster support.

faqSection.title: Help center
faqSection.description: Some common questions have been collected so you can quickly check them before contacting us directly.

formScheduleSection.title: Send information quickly and get support at the right time
formScheduleSection.description: You can send a request directly through the form or check our working hours to receive a faster response.

heroSection.description: Message SmartMall when you need product advice, order support, or want to check information before buying.

visual.description: Clear consultation, quick checks, and support before you buy.

workingHoursCard.title: Working hours
workingHoursCard.noteDescription: Outside business hours, we still check messages periodically and prioritize urgent requests.

seo.title: Business cooperation
seo.description: Contact SmartMall for business cooperation and product distribution.

cooperationPage.title: Cooperation contact
cooperationPage.description: Would you like to cooperate on business, advertising, product distribution, or become a partner? We are always ready to listen to your proposal and grow together.
cooperationPage.note: Or send your cooperation proposal by email to receive a response within 24–48 hours.

validation.required: Please enter your email, subject, and message!

message.success: Your message has been sent successfully!
message.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later!

contactForm.title: Send a message to the shop
contactForm.description: Fill in the information below and the shop will reply as soon as possible.
contactForm.successDescription: Your message has been sent successfully. I will reply as soon as possible!
